name: Scarab Cuirass
description:
The cuirass of this +1 deathless resilient leather armor, stitched to resemble an Osiriani scarab beetle, feels strangely chitinous. You gain resistance 5 to void damage.

Activate (2 Actions) command, Interact

Effect You cast a 1st-rank Pest Form. You can only become a scarab beetle.

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of pest form.
